authorization_phrase: Authorize s18-d1 broad-universe weekly relative-strength rotation P1 plan-lock only — bound by DR10 v2 + walk-forward K13.
dr10_v2_binding: carried by-reference from SEAL (78cd22e); not redefined at P1
edge_not_inherited_note: weekly edge UNTESTED; NOT inherited from monthly s17; must be re-proven at P6 IS (K1/K2)
framework_k13_binding: walk-forward persistence (52a3b60); carried by-reference; not redefined at P1
inherited_constraints_block_C6_carried_v: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades >= 100 total; OOS >= 50/y; no relaxation at any phase. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, IS-only) PASSES: aggregate 229; per-fold F1/F2/F3 68/69/72 (~54-57/y); OOS projected ~100-113/2y.

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-reference 52a3b60): locked rule positive in >=3 of 5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds + aggregate net>0 + K9 (per-fold OR aggregate); P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Fold boundaries LOCKED byte-equivalent at DA22.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the s17 monthly economics (+$1,130.75/trade, win 63.5%, PF 2.42) were measured at MONTHLY cadence and do NOT carry to weekly. Weekly is the WEAKEST first-principles edge basis in the monthly/fortnightly/weekly ladder; the weekly edge MUST be re-proven at P6 IS (K1 sharpe_proxy>0 AND K2 expectancy>0).

STOP-BEFORE-PROMOTION (terminal, NOT a cadence/M tune): the pre-SEAL K9 gate PASSED (so SEAL proceeded); the EDGE is the remaining open gate. If P6 IS shows the weekly edge negative/zero (K1/K2 fail), OR K13 (P6.7) shows <3/5 folds positive, OR P10 measures OOS K9 < 50/y, the candidate is terminal. A further cadence/M change is a SEPARATE fresh candidate.

RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): RS-rotation practitioner-family native weekly cadence; signal 126-21 (ranking metric); select top-M=8 equal-weight; exit = loss of relative rank (no trailing/ATR stop).
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) first-principles JUSTIFIED (not tuned, not K9-fitted, not tuned after the pre-SEAL measurement) and LOCKED byte-equivalent at SEAL (DA6/DA8/DA10/DA11).
DA3 equal-weight 1/M sizing; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-reference to framework SEAL 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. Weekly is the highest-cost_drag rung in the family (~0.3-0.8% S1; ~1-2% S4) but clears <<5%; P6.5 cost-stress more load-bearing.
split_only adjustment convention CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse DR9-passed CSVs; switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN.
24-name broad universe LOCKED at PLAN; widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).
DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 24 by REUSE (sealed d86e5d1; result_seal 85667ab3); NO fresh fetch; cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent.
A7 effective_independent_bets + K10 avg_pairwise_correlation + K6 dispersion LOAD-BEARING (top-8 ~8 sectors); NOT the candidate's risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).

s17/s16/s15/s14/s13/s12 terminal preserved verbatim; this candidate is a FRESH SIBLING (not an s17 _revN_/patch, not a rescue of the fortnightly s18 PLAN d2f0cc7); clears T-FORBID-16..24; NOT re-evaluated under K13.
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: parameters first-principles justified at SEAL, NOT grid-searched; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; cadence NOT tuned after the pre-SEAL K9 measurement.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; the 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.
